_comment: Single source of truth for Stripe products/prices. Amounts are USD cents — PLACEHOLDER launch pricing, edit freely then re-run `node scripts/stripe-bootstrap.mjs` (it migrates lookup keys to new prices). lookup_key is how the app finds prices at checkout; never reuse a key for a different item.
